activity.name: MatchClues

intro.title: Investigation Report
intro.text:
Drag the correct clues to the boxes on the right to answer the questions.
Good luck!

activity.instructions: Click-and-Drag the clues to answer the questions.
activity.question: What suggests that Dr. Phillips was murdered?
Whose weapon was the deadly shot fired from?
Who was in close contact with the victim shortly before she died?
What suggests that the pain clinic was involved in illegal activities?

outro.title: WELL DONE!
outro.text:
The evidence you collected was enough to charge Edgar White with murder. His lawyer advised him not to talk.
Looks like this case will be going to trial.
